creator: debdrup@freebsd.org
text: This has landed in releng/13.0 as of https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?h=releng/13.0&id=82874dcb3610b1e57fb6b1b9db96ac4996bfa620 and stable/12 as of https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=82874dcb3610b1e57fb6b1b9db96ac4996bfa620&h=stable%2F12, so is it okay to close this?
